final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input ena,
    input up,
    output reg [31:0] q);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 32'b0;
        end else if (ena) begin
            if (up) begin
                q <= q + 1;
            end else begin
                q <= q - 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
